text: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis, an update. [Report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/reports/index.html). [Agricultural](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agrarisch/index.html). 05/19/2025 • 9 minutes reading. [Pierre Berntsen](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/autoriteit/pierre-berntsen/index.html). [Jelmer Schreurs](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/jelmer-schreurs/index.html). The nitrogen publications and insights follow each other in rapid succession and the government has now published the starter package to unlock the Netherlands. An important part of this approach is the actual reduction of nitrogen emissions.

The nitrogen publications and insights follow each other in rapid succession and the government has now published the starter package to unlock the Netherlands. An important part of this approach is the actual reduction of nitrogen emissions. That is why ABN AMRO and CLM Research and Advice updated the results of research from 2022 into the cost-effectiveness of various measures in dairy farming.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
The nitrogen publications and insights follow each other in rapid succession and the government has now published the starter package to unlock the Netherlands. An important part of this approach is the actual reduction of nitrogen emissions. That is why ABN AMRO and CLM Research and Advice updated the results of research from 2022 into the cost-effectiveness of various measures in dairy farming. Download the complete report. Read all the facts and developments in the report 'Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis, an update'.
[Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update (May 2025). 972 KB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/rapport-pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis-mei-2025_tcm16-263854.pdf).

[Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update (May 2025). 972 KB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/rapport-pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis-mei-2025_tcm16-263854.pdf). Management measures such as reducing the protein content in the feed, more grazing or keeping fewer young cattle are the most cost-effective. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
Read all the facts and developments in the report 'Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis, an update'.
[Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update (May 2025). 972 KB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/rapport-pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis-mei-2025_tcm16-263854.pdf). Management measures such as reducing the protein content in the feed, more grazing or keeping fewer young cattle are the most cost-effective. These measures cost little to both the dairy farmer and the taxpayer. However, management measures alone do not sufficiently reduce nitrogen emissions. Technical innovations such as the LelySphere or manure fermentation (with daily defertilization) are 'second best' in terms of cost-effectiveness and also widely applicable.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Management measures such as reducing the protein content in the feed, more grazing or keeping fewer young cattle are the most cost-effective. These measures cost little to both the dairy farmer and the taxpayer. However, management measures alone do not sufficiently reduce nitrogen emissions. Technical innovations such as the LelySphere or manure fermentation (with daily defertilization) are 'second best' in terms of cost-effectiveness and also widely applicable. The government is working on legal recognition, but this remains not easy for a number of technical and management measures.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: These measures cost little to both the dairy farmer and the taxpayer. However, management measures alone do not sufficiently reduce nitrogen emissions. Technical innovations such as the LelySphere or manure fermentation (with daily defertilization) are 'second best' in terms of cost-effectiveness and also widely applicable. The government is working on legal recognition, but this remains not easy for a number of technical and management measures. Legal recognition (guarantee) for the monitoring of national and regional emissions seems feasible.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: However, management measures alone do not sufficiently reduce nitrogen emissions. Technical innovations such as the LelySphere or manure fermentation (with daily defertilization) are 'second best' in terms of cost-effectiveness and also widely applicable. The government is working on legal recognition, but this remains not easy for a number of technical and management measures. Legal recognition (guarantee) for the monitoring of national and regional emissions seems feasible. But whether guaranteeing the reduced emissions is actually valid for the company's permit is still a major challenge.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Technical innovations such as the LelySphere or manure fermentation (with daily defertilization) are 'second best' in terms of cost-effectiveness and also widely applicable. The government is working on legal recognition, but this remains not easy for a number of technical and management measures. Legal recognition (guarantee) for the monitoring of national and regional emissions seems feasible. But whether guaranteeing the reduced emissions is actually valid for the company's permit is still a major challenge. Buying out or relocating companies is expensive for the government, but legally guaranteed.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The government is working on legal recognition, but this remains not easy for a number of technical and management measures. Legal recognition (guarantee) for the monitoring of national and regional emissions seems feasible. But whether guaranteeing the reduced emissions is actually valid for the company's permit is still a major challenge. Buying out or relocating companies is expensive for the government, but legally guaranteed. However, because this concerns a very limited group of companies, the impact on the total emission reduction by the sector is limited.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Buying out or relocating companies is expensive for the government, but legally guaranteed. However, because this concerns a very limited group of companies, the impact on the total emission reduction by the sector is limited. Why this research? Nitrogen is undeniably one of the most complicated dossiers for the Dutch government. The government is working on a fundamental adjustment to the permit system in combination with emission reduction and nature restoration.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: However, because this concerns a very limited group of companies, the impact on the total emission reduction by the sector is limited. Why this research? Nitrogen is undeniably one of the most complicated dossiers for the Dutch government. The government is working on a fundamental adjustment to the permit system in combination with emission reduction and nature restoration. In this permit system, the government aims to ensure that target management forms the basis for guaranteed emission reductions by companies. [Goal steering](https://edepot.wur.nl/671481) is a policy approach in which the government focuses on the goals (for example maximum nitrogen emissions) that it wants to achieve and refrains from prescribing resources and measures that it believes are necessary to achieve the goals.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Why this research? Nitrogen is undeniably one of the most complicated dossiers for the Dutch government. The government is working on a fundamental adjustment to the permit system in combination with emission reduction and nature restoration. In this permit system, the government aims to ensure that target management forms the basis for guaranteed emission reductions by companies. [Goal steering](https://edepot.wur.nl/671481) is a policy approach in which the government focuses on the goals (for example maximum nitrogen emissions) that it wants to achieve and refrains from prescribing resources and measures that it believes are necessary to achieve the goals. For the time being, however, permits remain based on the AERIUS model and deposition policy.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Nitrogen is undeniably one of the most complicated dossiers for the Dutch government. The government is working on a fundamental adjustment to the permit system in combination with emission reduction and nature restoration. In this permit system, the government aims to ensure that target management forms the basis for guaranteed emission reductions by companies. [Goal steering](https://edepot.wur.nl/671481) is a policy approach in which the government focuses on the goals (for example maximum nitrogen emissions) that it wants to achieve and refrains from prescribing resources and measures that it believes are necessary to achieve the goals. For the time being, however, permits remain based on the AERIUS model and deposition policy. And the competent authority is very reluctant to issue permits as a result of a ruling by the Council of State regarding the internal netting of emissions.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The government is working on a fundamental adjustment to the permit system in combination with emission reduction and nature restoration. In this permit system, the government aims to ensure that target management forms the basis for guaranteed emission reductions by companies. [Goal steering](https://edepot.wur.nl/671481) is a policy approach in which the government focuses on the goals (for example maximum nitrogen emissions) that it wants to achieve and refrains from prescribing resources and measures that it believes are necessary to achieve the goals. For the time being, however, permits remain based on the AERIUS model and deposition policy. And the competent authority is very reluctant to issue permits as a result of a ruling by the Council of State regarding the internal netting of emissions. This also applies if these adjustments lead to reduced emissions or are necessary to improve animal welfare.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: In this permit system, the government aims to ensure that target management forms the basis for guaranteed emission reductions by companies. [Goal steering](https://edepot.wur.nl/671481) is a policy approach in which the government focuses on the goals (for example maximum nitrogen emissions) that it wants to achieve and refrains from prescribing resources and measures that it believes are necessary to achieve the goals. For the time being, however, permits remain based on the AERIUS model and deposition policy. And the competent authority is very reluctant to issue permits as a result of a ruling by the Council of State regarding the internal netting of emissions. This also applies if these adjustments lead to reduced emissions or are necessary to improve animal welfare. As a result, ABN AMRO also expects 2025 to be a year of standstill for sustainability and business development.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: And the competent authority is very reluctant to issue permits as a result of a ruling by the Council of State regarding the internal netting of emissions. This also applies if these adjustments lead to reduced emissions or are necessary to improve animal welfare. As a result, ABN AMRO also expects 2025 to be a year of standstill for sustainability and business development. Ultimately, it is about actual reduction of nitrogen emissions. A combination of measures will be necessary to achieve the targeted reduction of 42 to 46 percent in 2035 compared to 2019.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: As a result, ABN AMRO also expects 2025 to be a year of standstill for sustainability and business development. Ultimately, it is about actual reduction of nitrogen emissions. A combination of measures will be necessary to achieve the targeted reduction of 42 to 46 percent in 2035 compared to 2019. The question is what the financial consequences are of the various measures. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Ultimately, it is about actual reduction of nitrogen emissions. A combination of measures will be necessary to achieve the targeted reduction of 42 to 46 percent in 2035 compared to 2019. The question is what the financial consequences are of the various measures. With the abolition of the National Rural Area Program, the government's financial scope to tackle the nitrogen dossier has been severely limited. It is therefore even more important to know how effective the measures are and how the different choices relate to each other.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: A combination of measures will be necessary to achieve the targeted reduction of 42 to 46 percent in 2035 compared to 2019. With the abolition of the National Rural Area Program, the government's financial scope to tackle the nitrogen dossier has been severely limited. To support dairy farmers and managers in making choices, ABN AMRO requested CLM Research and Advice in 2022 to conduct research into the cost-effectiveness of a number of measures for dairy farming.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
Time for an update of the insights. The measures examined can be classified as follows:. 1. Management measures: adjustments in business operations
2. Technological measures: technical innovations
3. Structural measures: buyout or relocation of companies. [Read also: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agratisch/pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis.html)
Management measures are the cheapest, but lack legal recognition.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
The measures examined can be classified as follows:. 1. Management measures: adjustments in business operations
2. Technological measures: technical innovations
3. Structural measures: buyout or relocation of companies. [Read also: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agratisch/pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis.html)
Management measures are the cheapest, but lack legal recognition. Figure 1 compares the potential emission reduction at company level per measure against the costs.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
Management measures: adjustments in business operations
2. Technological measures: technical innovations
3. Structural measures: buyout or relocation of companies. [Read also: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agratisch/pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis.html)
Management measures are the cheapest, but lack legal recognition. Figure 1 compares the potential emission reduction at company level per measure against the costs. This shows that management measures, provided they are appropriate for the company, are the low-hanging fruit.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text:
Technological measures: technical innovations
3. Structural measures: buyout or relocation of companies. [Read also: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agratisch/pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis.html)
Management measures are the cheapest, but lack legal recognition. Figure 1 compares the potential emission reduction at company level per measure against the costs. This shows that management measures, provided they are appropriate for the company, are the low-hanging fruit. They cost relatively little money and can be implemented quickly.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

Structural measures: buyout or relocation of companies. [Read also: Pragmatic approach to the nitrogen crisis](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agratisch/pragatieve-actie-nitrostofcrisis.html)
Management measures are the cheapest, but lack legal recognition. Figure 1 compares the potential emission reduction at company level per measure against the costs. This shows that management measures, provided they are appropriate for the company, are the low-hanging fruit. They cost relatively little money and can be implemented quickly. However, the potential emission reduction is limited.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Figure 1 compares the potential emission reduction at company level per measure against the costs. This shows that management measures, provided they are appropriate for the company, are the low-hanging fruit. They cost relatively little money and can be implemented quickly. However, the potential emission reduction is limited. The costs for the national treasury are very limited because they are often carried out without support from the government.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: This shows that management measures, provided they are appropriate for the company, are the low-hanging fruit. They cost relatively little money and can be implemented quickly. However, the potential emission reduction is limited. The costs for the national treasury are very limited because they are often carried out without support from the government. In short, very attractive measures for the government.

text: They cost relatively little money and can be implemented quickly. However, the potential emission reduction is limited. The costs for the national treasury are very limited because they are often carried out without support from the government. In short, very attractive measures for the government. A major disadvantage is that the legal embedding for individual companies is not guaranteed.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: However, the potential emission reduction is limited. The costs for the national treasury are very limited because they are often carried out without support from the government. In short, very attractive measures for the government. A major disadvantage is that the legal embedding for individual companies is not guaranteed. So a PAS reporter, 'internal balancer' or 'interim' cannot yet achieve legalization with this in the current legal framework.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The costs for the national treasury are very limited because they are often carried out without support from the government. In short, very attractive measures for the government. A major disadvantage is that the legal embedding for individual companies is not guaranteed. So a PAS reporter, 'internal balancer' or 'interim' cannot yet achieve legalization with this in the current legal framework. When goal management is introduced, this category of measures is attractive and effective from both a commercial and social perspective.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: In short, very attractive measures for the government. A major disadvantage is that the legal embedding for individual companies is not guaranteed. So a PAS reporter, 'internal balancer' or 'interim' cannot yet achieve legalization with this in the current legal framework. When goal management is introduced, this category of measures is attractive and effective from both a commercial and social perspective. The buyout and relocation schemes (structural measures), on the other hand, are legally guaranteed because the animals and phosphate rights disappear.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: A major disadvantage is that the legal embedding for individual companies is not guaranteed. So a PAS reporter, 'internal balancer' or 'interim' cannot yet achieve legalization with this in the current legal framework. When goal management is introduced, this category of measures is attractive and effective from both a commercial and social perspective. The buyout and relocation schemes (structural measures), on the other hand, are legally guaranteed because the animals and phosphate rights disappear. They can achieve up to 49 percent nitrogen reduction.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: So a PAS reporter, 'internal balancer' or 'interim' cannot yet achieve legalization with this in the current legal framework. When goal management is introduced, this category of measures is attractive and effective from both a commercial and social perspective. The buyout and relocation schemes (structural measures), on the other hand, are legally guaranteed because the animals and phosphate rights disappear. They can achieve up to 49 percent nitrogen reduction. The other half of the emissions does not take place via the stable but via the field and therefore remains present.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: When goal management is introduced, this category of measures is attractive and effective from both a commercial and social perspective. The buyout and relocation schemes (structural measures), on the other hand, are legally guaranteed because the animals and phosphate rights disappear. They can achieve up to 49 percent nitrogen reduction. The other half of the emissions does not take place via the stable but via the field and therefore remains present. Buy-out and relocation are associated with high costs of 43 (LBV) to 49 euros (LBV-Plus) per kg of nitrogen per year, which must be borne by the government and therefore society.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The buyout and relocation schemes (structural measures), on the other hand, are legally guaranteed because the animals and phosphate rights disappear. They can achieve up to 49 percent nitrogen reduction. The other half of the emissions does not take place via the stable but via the field and therefore remains present. Buy-out and relocation are associated with high costs of 43 (LBV) to 49 euros (LBV-Plus) per kg of nitrogen per year, which must be borne by the government and therefore society. Assuming a depreciation period for these costs of 25 years.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: They can achieve up to 49 percent nitrogen reduction. The other half of the emissions does not take place via the stable but via the field and therefore remains present. Buy-out and relocation are associated with high costs of 43 (LBV) to 49 euros (LBV-Plus) per kg of nitrogen per year, which must be borne by the government and therefore society. Assuming a depreciation period for these costs of 25 years. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via structural measures (LBV and LBV-plus) would then be between 170 and 200 million euros per year.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The other half of the emissions does not take place via the stable but via the field and therefore remains present. Buy-out and relocation are associated with high costs of 43 (LBV) to 49 euros (LBV-Plus) per kg of nitrogen per year, which must be borne by the government and therefore society. Assuming a depreciation period for these costs of 25 years. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via structural measures (LBV and LBV-plus) would then be between 170 and 200 million euros per year. The high costs and voluntary consent of entrepreneurs to these schemes ensure that these measures only apply to a limited group.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Buy-out and relocation are associated with high costs of 43 (LBV) to 49 euros (LBV-Plus) per kg of nitrogen per year, which must be borne by the government and therefore society. Assuming a depreciation period for these costs of 25 years. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via structural measures (LBV and LBV-plus) would then be between 170 and 200 million euros per year. The high costs and voluntary consent of entrepreneurs to these schemes ensure that these measures only apply to a limited group. Important side effects are that buyout reduces pressure on the manure market and has an impact on the supplying and processing industry.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Assuming a depreciation period for these costs of 25 years. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via structural measures (LBV and LBV-plus) would then be between 170 and 200 million euros per year. The high costs and voluntary consent of entrepreneurs to these schemes ensure that these measures only apply to a limited group. Important side effects are that buyout reduces pressure on the manure market and has an impact on the supplying and processing industry. In addition, loss of grassland in favor of arable crops may lead to a higher risk of emissions to groundwater.

In addition, loss of grassland in favor of arable crops may lead to a higher risk of emissions to groundwater. Technical measures are 'second best' and legal recognition is underway.

Important side effects are that buyout reduces pressure on the manure market and has an impact on the supplying and processing industry. In addition, loss of grassland in favor of arable crops may lead to a higher risk of emissions to groundwater. Technical measures are 'second best' and legal recognition is underway. Technical innovations are considerably cheaper than structural measures and can be implemented by a larger group of dairy farmers.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Important side effects are that buyout reduces pressure on the manure market and has an impact on the supplying and processing industry. In addition, loss of grassland in favor of arable crops may lead to a higher risk of emissions to groundwater. Technical measures are 'second best' and legal recognition is underway. Technical innovations are considerably cheaper than structural measures and can be implemented by a larger group of dairy farmers. The reduction costs for technical measures are – depending on the technology – between 5 and 31 euros per kg of nitrogen per year.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: In addition, loss of grassland in favor of arable crops may lead to a higher risk of emissions to groundwater. Technical measures are 'second best' and legal recognition is underway. Technical innovations are considerably cheaper than structural measures and can be implemented by a larger group of dairy farmers. The reduction costs for technical measures are – depending on the technology – between 5 and 31 euros per kg of nitrogen per year. However, the legal recognition (guarantee) of some low-emission floors remains uncertain because they work less well than expected.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Technical measures are 'second best' and legal recognition is underway. Technical innovations are considerably cheaper than structural measures and can be implemented by a larger group of dairy farmers. The reduction costs for technical measures are – depending on the technology – between 5 and 31 euros per kg of nitrogen per year. However, the legal recognition (guarantee) of some low-emission floors remains uncertain because they work less well than expected. The reduction via LelySphere and CowToilet has now been recognised, but this is not yet the case for a composite technique such as daily demansification and manure fermentation.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The reduction via LelySphere and CowToilet has now been recognised, but this is not yet the case for a composite technique such as daily demansification and manure fermentation. The government has now opened a subsidy program for technological innovations. For example, the investment subsidy for peak loads on a LelySphere is 80 percent. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The government has now opened a subsidy program for technological innovations. For example, the investment subsidy for peak loads on a LelySphere is 80 percent. The costs of investment and operation are thus divided between dairy farmer and government, or between farmer and citizen. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via technical measures is between 20 million euros (fermentation of fresh manure) and 84 million euros (Lely Sphere) per year. We will not take the low-emission floors into account here, but they are included in Figure 1 for clarification.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: For example, the investment subsidy for peak loads on a LelySphere is 80 percent. The costs of investment and operation are thus divided between dairy farmer and government, or between farmer and citizen. The cost of a ten percent reduction in total dairy farm emissions via technical measures is between 20 million euros (fermentation of fresh manure) and 84 million euros (Lely Sphere) per year. We will not take the low-emission floors into account here, but they are included in Figure 1 for clarification. CowToilet did not yet have official recognition in 2022 and is therefore not included in the analysis.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The costs of investment and operation are thus divided between dairy farmer and government, or between farmer and citizen. We will not take the low-emission floors into account here, but they are included in Figure 1 for clarification. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: It is obviously not desirable that the application of technical measures leads to a decrease in grazing in the sector. Inflation drives up investment costs in technology, digestion revenue model improves. In recent years, reduction costs for technical measures have increased considerably. Main reason: high inflation. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Inflation drives up investment costs in technology, digestion revenue model improves. In recent years, reduction costs for technical measures have increased considerably. Main reason: high inflation. The costs for technical innovations such as the low-emission floor and the LelySphere have increased by 15 percent over the past two years. On the other hand, the revenue model for fermentation of fresh manure improved.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: In recent years, reduction costs for technical measures have increased considerably. Main reason: high inflation. The costs for technical innovations such as the low-emission floor and the LelySphere have increased by 15 percent over the past two years. On the other hand, the revenue model for fermentation of fresh manure improved. This can be explained by the higher SDE guaranteed price for energy production from manure fermentation, which more than compensates for the higher investment costs.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Main reason: high inflation. The costs for technical innovations such as the low-emission floor and the LelySphere have increased by 15 percent over the past two years. On the other hand, the revenue model for fermentation of fresh manure improved. This can be explained by the higher SDE guaranteed price for energy production from manure fermentation, which more than compensates for the higher investment costs. Not only prices have changed, but the context of the livestock farmer is also different.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The costs for technical innovations such as the low-emission floor and the LelySphere have increased by 15 percent over the past two years. On the other hand, the revenue model for fermentation of fresh manure improved. This can be explained by the higher SDE guaranteed price for energy production from manure fermentation, which more than compensates for the higher investment costs. Not only prices have changed, but the context of the livestock farmer is also different. With the expiration of the manure derogation, many farmers are left with a manure surplus.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: On the other hand, the revenue model for fermentation of fresh manure improved. This can be explained by the higher SDE guaranteed price for energy production from manure fermentation, which more than compensates for the higher investment costs. Not only prices have changed, but the context of the livestock farmer is also different. With the expiration of the manure derogation, many farmers are left with a manure surplus. Disposing of manure via an intermediary easily costs more than 25 euros per cubic meter.

text: This can be explained by the higher SDE guaranteed price for energy production from manure fermentation, which more than compensates for the higher investment costs. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Not only prices have changed, but the context of the livestock farmer is also different. With the expiration of the manure derogation, many farmers are left with a manure surplus. Disposing of manure via an intermediary easily costs more than 25 euros per cubic meter. Fermenting and processing manure can therefore become an attractive alternative. metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: With the expiration of the manure derogation, many farmers are left with a manure surplus. Disposing of manure via an intermediary easily costs more than 25 euros per cubic meter. Fermenting and processing manure can therefore become an attractive alternative. The recognition of Renure fertilizers is important for this. We expect an increase in manure fermentation in the coming years, provided that progress is made in the granting of permits for stable modifications and digesters.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Disposing of manure via an intermediary easily costs more than 25 euros per cubic meter. Fermenting and processing manure can therefore become an attractive alternative. The recognition of Renure fertilizers is important for this. We expect an increase in manure fermentation in the coming years, provided that progress is made in the granting of permits for stable modifications and digesters. An obligation to add green gas to fossil gas can increase returns and also make fermentation interesting for smaller companies.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Fermenting and processing manure can therefore become an attractive alternative. The recognition of Renure fertilizers is important for this. We expect an increase in manure fermentation in the coming years, provided that progress is made in the granting of permits for stable modifications and digesters. An obligation to add green gas to fossil gas can increase returns and also make fermentation interesting for smaller companies. For more information, see the publication: How manure fermentation helps make the Netherlands greener. [Read also: How mono-manure fermentation helps green the Netherlands](/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/agrarisch/hoe-mono-mestvergisting-nederland-helpt-vergroenen.html).

In January 2025, WUR published an '[exploration of effects agricultural innovations](https://www.wur.nl/nl/nieuws/informatie-biedt-kansen-voor-minder-stikstof-en-broeikasgassen-uit-de-landbouw-maar-extensivering-blijft-Need.ht m#:~:text=In%20commission%20of%20the%20Interprovincial%20Consultation%20%28IPO%2C%20the,of%20ammonia%2C%20greenhouse gases%20and%20nitrate%20sufficiently%20to%20reduce.)' containing an interesting overview of a large number of measures to reduce emissions to the air, soil and water from livestock farming. Even more recently, last April, Wouter de Heij shared his insights in [From the nitrogen trap for EUR 0.5 to 1 billion per year](https://www.foodlog.nl/artikelen/uit-de-stikstoffuik-voor-0-5-1-biljard-per-jaar) how the government can cost-effectively reduce ammonia emissions from livestock farming.

text: In January 2025, WUR published an '[exploration of effects agricultural innovations](https://www.wur.nl/nl/nieuws/informatie-biedt-kansen-voor-minder-stikstof-en-broeikasgassen-uit-de-landbouw-maar-extensivering-blijft-Need.ht m#:~:text=In%20commission%20of%20the%20Interprovincial%20Consultation%20%28IPO%2C%20the,of%20ammonia%2C%20greenhouse gases%20and%20nitrate%20sufficiently%20to%20reduce.)' containing an interesting overview of a large number of measures to reduce emissions to the air, soil and water from livestock farming. Even more recently, last April, Wouter de Heij shared his insights in [From the nitrogen trap for EUR 0.5 to 1 billion per year](https://www.foodlog.nl/artikelen/uit-de-stikstoffuik-voor-0-5-1-biljard-per-jaar) how the government can cost-effectively reduce ammonia emissions from livestock farming. This overview concerns the entire livestock industry and also discusses an area approach. In essence, the conclusions and recommendations of both studies are in line with those of this study.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: In these cases, in addition to stable emissions, reduction of field emissions must also be considered. Perhaps Mother Nature is looking wistfully at our legal fine-tuning. Because let's face it, would it make much difference to her whether a reduction in nitrogen tax is legally recognized or will she simply be happy with every mole of nitrogen less on her coat? The nitrogen crisis and ABN AMRO. Our concern goes out to entrepreneurs and families who are struggling with the uncertainty about their permit and therefore their future.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Perhaps Mother Nature is looking wistfully at our legal fine-tuning. Because let's face it, would it make much difference to her whether a reduction in nitrogen tax is legally recognized or will she simply be happy with every mole of nitrogen less on her coat? The nitrogen crisis and ABN AMRO. Our concern goes out to entrepreneurs and families who are struggling with the uncertainty about their permit and therefore their future. We think it is important to indicate that ABN AMRO stands by its customers and supports them with questions in the financial field.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Because let's face it, would it make much difference to her whether a reduction in nitrogen tax is legally recognized or will she simply be happy with every mole of nitrogen less on her coat? The nitrogen crisis and ABN AMRO. Our concern goes out to entrepreneurs and families who are struggling with the uncertainty about their permit and therefore their future. We think it is important to indicate that ABN AMRO stands by its customers and supports them with questions in the financial field. We realize that farmers' concerns are often broader and deeper than just nitrogen.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: The nitrogen crisis and ABN AMRO. Our concern goes out to entrepreneurs and families who are struggling with the uncertainty about their permit and therefore their future. We think it is important to indicate that ABN AMRO stands by its customers and supports them with questions in the financial field. We realize that farmers' concerns are often broader and deeper than just nitrogen. ABN AMRO supports clients in developing the company across the board.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: Our concern goes out to entrepreneurs and families who are struggling with the uncertainty about their permit and therefore their future. We think it is important to indicate that ABN AMRO stands by its customers and supports them with questions in the financial field. We realize that farmers' concerns are often broader and deeper than just nitrogen. ABN AMRO supports clients in developing the company across the board. This may involve reducing emissions or other sustainability plans, expansion, business succession, growth or winding down of the company.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: We think it is important to indicate that ABN AMRO stands by its customers and supports them with questions in the financial field. We realize that farmers' concerns are often broader and deeper than just nitrogen. ABN AMRO supports clients in developing the company across the board. This may involve reducing emissions or other sustainability plans, expansion, business succession, growth or winding down of the company. We pay attention to the entrepreneur, to developments in society and the market and to legislation and regulations.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: We realize that farmers' concerns are often broader and deeper than just nitrogen. ABN AMRO supports clients in developing the company across the board. This may involve reducing emissions or other sustainability plans, expansion, business succession, growth or winding down of the company. We pay attention to the entrepreneur, to developments in society and the market and to legislation and regulations. We monitor the income and revenue model of the entrepreneur.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: ABN AMRO supports clients in developing the company across the board. This may involve reducing emissions or other sustainability plans, expansion, business succession, growth or winding down of the company. We pay attention to the entrepreneur, to developments in society and the market and to legislation and regulations. We monitor the income and revenue model of the entrepreneur. We also want to prevent extensive investments from taking place at a location where it later turned out that there was no room for development.

metadata.source_title: Pragmatic approach to nitrogen crisis, an update

text: This may involve reducing emissions or other sustainability plans, expansion, business succession, growth or winding down of the company. We pay attention to the entrepreneur, to developments in society and the market and to legislation and regulations. We monitor the income and revenue model of the entrepreneur. We also want to prevent extensive investments from taking place at a location where it later turned out that there was no room for development. Just like entrepreneurs, banks also need certainty about the perspective of the company in a specific location.
